status: PASS — runner functional smoke only; explicitly non-qualifying

scope.purpose: Validate the frozen pair-plan generator, whole-invocation and per-condition source/runner identity seals, isolated-source loader, warmup enforcement, worker lifecycle, exact per-decision timing/counters including illegalIncumbent, task-level logical-work and safety comparison, accepted-action retention, digest comparison, active-wall accounting, and evidence writers.
scope.bootstrapOmitted: The smoke does not contain the required 21 strata x 10 pair clusters.

source.construction: Two new git archive exports of baselineCommit; candidate received only the two production overlays below. Neither previously instrumented exact-trace archive nor an earlier latency-smoke archive was reused.

dependencies.nodeModules: Both archive roots symlinked the live common node_modules directory; the runner records only its resolved path.
dependencies.limitation: Installed dependency and dependency-lock contents remain outside the source/runner before-after invariant.

runner.workerShutdown: PASS — the command exited normally; no latency-panel worker process remained.

methodology.schedule: The 21 stable cohort/map blocks alternate AB then BA by block: even blocks run baseline then candidate; odd blocks run candidate then baseline. This is gross order balance, not same-block ABBA replication.
methodology.workerTopology: Two persistent variant-isolated pools are resident. At c12 this creates and warms 24 workers total, while only the selected 12-worker pool is active during a block phase.
methodology.activeWallDefinition: Per-variant sum of post-warmup runBlock wall durations, including parent scheduling, worker execution, structured-clone serialization, worker-to-parent IPC, and promise aggregation; excludes warmup and opposite-arm idle time.
methodology.warmupBypassPolicy: --skip-warmup is rejected for full-evidence runs and is available only for non-qualifying smoke diagnostics.
methodology.sourcePolicy: Panel and plan operations enforce frozen full src-tree identities plus the exact two-file overlay; seals include current runner bytes. Panel seals are checked before/after every concurrency condition and again across the complete invocation. profile-variant enforces the full-tree identity corresponding to its baseline/candidate label.
methodology.logicalWorkPolicy: Exactly 10 fields are compared task-by-task: accepted actions plus decisionCount, searchDecisions, searched, candidatesTotal, scoredCandidatesTotal, rolloutTurnsTotal, illegalIncumbent, overrides, and singleCandidate. A mismatch is qualifying only when that same task has an explicitly counted bounded deadline-fallback, circuit-open, or circuit-skip divergence.
methodology.illegalIncumbentSafetyPolicy: Sum max(0, candidate illegalIncumbent - baseline illegalIncumbent) independently per matched task and require zero; candidate decreases on other tasks cannot mask an increase.
methodology.failurePolicy: Worker error/exit rejects readiness or pending work, partially created pools are stopped, and condition teardown stops both pools.

measured.performanceInterpretation: None. Two matched observations are a functional smoke, not an estimator; neither the active-wall ratio nor the decision timing direction is used as performance evidence.

hostValidity.reason: The runner's load/free-memory snapshots do not prove AC power, nominal thermals, normal memory pressure, or continuous absence of competing processes.

typescript.command: bunx tsc --noEmit --module ESNext --moduleResolution bundler --target ESNext --types bun --skipLibCheck docs/evidence/tools/a13_latency_panel.ts

fullSkipWarmupRejection.message: --skip-warmup is smoke-only; every full-evidence run must execute the frozen warmup

smoke.rawArtifactDurability: temporary; compact evidence is retained in this file

remainingGates: After main stabilizes, construct a fresh final-base baseline/candidate archive pair from the exact parent of the ray commit; the f02e806 source pair remains historical isolated evidence.
Run the complete 420-match-per-variant panel at c1, c4, and c12.
At c1, require the 95% bootstrap lower bounds for both total-decision and search-time reduction to be greater than 0%.
At every condition, require the upper 95% pair-cluster bootstrap bounds for all-decision p95 and p99 candidate/baseline ratios to be at most 1.05.
At c4 and c12, require candidate active-phase wall time to be at most 1.05 times baseline.

Require the complete matched task set, absolute candidate engineRejectedActions=0, zero candidate-only safety regressions including zero positive per-task illegalIncumbent increases, and zero unattributed task-level logical-work mismatches across the exact 10-field vector.
Join and validate one-second continuous AC/thermal/memory-pressure/external-process host evidence for every complete block.
Run three fixed-work CPU-profile captures per variant (nine repeats of seeds 1,42,43,44,45,46; 3,249 accepted actions per capture) with enforced full-tree variant identity.
Seal the installed dependency tree rather than only identifying package.json/node_modules provenance.
